amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 29 — paragraph 5 b (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 29 — paragraph 5 b (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

5 b. Deployers of high-risk AI systems that are public authorities or Union institutions, bodies, offices and agencies or undertakings referred to in Article 51(1a)(b) shall comply with the registration obligations referred to in Article 51.
parliament_text: 5 b. Deployers of high-risk AI systems that are public authorities or Union institutions, bodies, offices and agencies or undertakings referred to in Article 51(1a)(b) shall comply with the registration obligations referred to in Article 51.
